response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but the absence of proven expertise in routing tiling, real-time traffic integration, or production-grade geospatial data systems raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and dev-ops infrastructure across multiple environments
concerns: No evidence of C++ or Rust development in commercial routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines
Lacks documented experience with distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or consistency in geospatial contexts
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the core C++ stack required for this role
